triggerElement.note: ID is dynamically generated by bits-ui; at scrape time it was bits-c12

categories.name: Fast Models
categories.description: Affordable models for fast creative exploration.

models.name: Krea 2 Large
models.description: More powerful version of Krea 2 optimized for expressive photorealism.

models.name: Krea 2 Medium
models.description: A smaller variant of Krea 2. Works best with illustrations and graphic design

models.name: Krea 2 Turbo
models.description: The fastest Krea 2 model. Best for quickly iterating on expressive illustrations.

models.name: Krea 1
models.description: Most creative model with LoRAs. Excels at artistic photorealism. Realistic textures, weaker structure.

models.name: Flux 2 Klein
models.description: A lightweight 4 billion parameter version of Flux 2, optimized for speed while maintaining quality. Supports up to 2K resolution.

models.name: Qwen 2512
models.description: Latest Qwen model with enhanced human realism, finer natural detail for landscapes and textures, and improved text rendering with better layout and composition.

models.name: Flux
models.description: Best model for LoRA's. Fastest model. Highly customizable less realistic colors and textures.

models.name: Z Image
models.description: Cheapest model. Medium quality photorealism at a budget. Realistic textures, weak diversity.

models.name: Imagen 4 Fast
models.description: Google's fastest image model. Excellent prompt adherence. Capable of producing a wide range of subjects.

categories.name: Intelligent Models
categories.description: Frontier models that think deeply to visualize complex ideas.

models.name: ChatGPT 2
models.description: Smartest model. Excellent prompt following. Best for complex diagrams, characters, and image editing.

models.name: Nano Banana Pro
models.description: Smartest model. World's best prompt adherence. Best model for complex tasks and image editing.

models.name: Nano Banana 2
models.description: Google's latest flash image model (also known as Gemini 3.1 Flash Image) optimized for fast generation with support for up to 4K resolution.

models.name: Nano Banana
models.description: Smart model optimized for precise prompt adherence. Best for most tasks.

models.name: Seedream 5 Lite
models.description: Latest high-quality model from ByteDance with deep thinking, web search capabilities, and up to 14 style images.

models.name: Luma UNI-1
models.description: Luma UNI-1 reasons through prompts before generating and supports optional visual references.

models.name: ChatGPT 1.5
models.description: Smartest model. Excellent prompt following. Best for complex diagrams, characters, and image editing.

models.name: ChatGPT Image
models.description: Older ChatGPT image model. Intelligent prompt adherence with sharp semi-realistic output.

models.name: Imagen 4 Ultra
models.description: Google's best image model. Excellent prompt adherence. Capable of producing a wide range of subjects.

categories.name: Quality Models
categories.description: Explore a wide range of affordable models from around the world.

models.name: Ideogram 4.0
models.description: Open image model focused on design, text rendering, and 2K photorealistic output.

models.name: Recraft V4
models.description: Sharp, detailed images from Recraft with Standard and Pro modes.

models.name: Seedream 4
models.description: Latest high-quality model from ByteDance with flexible resolution support

models.name: Seedream 4.5
models.description: Quality 4K model optimized for vibrant photorealism.

models.name: Flux 2
models.description: FLUX.2 [dev] from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism and crisper text generation.

models.name: Flux 2 Pro
models.description: Medium quality model by Black Forest with stable visuals.

models.name: Flux 2 Flex
models.description: BFL's next generation model, excelling at rendering text and fine details.

models.name: Flux 2 Max
models.description: Frontier model by Black Forest Labs. Most capable Flux 2 model.

models.name: Wan 2.2
models.description: Cinematic outputs with crisp textures and realistic color palette, but weak diversity and structure,

models.name: Qwen
models.description: Semi-realistic model with great text generation and prompt adherence. Capable of following long and highly detailed prompts.

models.name: Kling O1
models.description: Kling Omni image model with support for up to 10 reference images with tags.

categories.name: Legacy Models
categories.description: Blasts from the past. Try out older models from various providers.

models.name: Flux Kontext
models.description: Frontier model designed for image editing. Capable of advanced reasoning and style transfer.

models.name: Flux Kontext Pro
models.description: Frontier model designed for image editing. Capable of advanced reasoning and style transfer.

models.name: Imagen 4
models.description: Google's best image model. Excellent prompt adherence. Capable of producing a wide range of subjects.

models.name: Runway Gen-4
models.description: Cinematic image model with references. Best at combining multiple characters into a single image.

models.name: Ideogram 3.0
models.description: Highly aesthetic, general-purpose model. Excels at flat and graphic styles.

models.name: Flux 1.1 Pro
models.description: Advanced yet efficent model from Black Forest Labs.

models.name: Flux 1.1 Pro Ultra
models.description: Black Forest Lab's highest quality model text to image model.

models.name: Imagen 3
models.description: Google's previous generation image model.

models.name: Flux.1 Krea
models.description: Distilled and open sourced version of Krea 1. Better at text rendering and anatomy.
